channel.title: made.json weekly digest
channel.description: Recent additions and updates from the seeded made.json network.

item.title: Ada Lovelace joined made.json
item.description: Fictional demo feed used to show the made.json directory and digest surfaces.

item.title: Outreach
item.description: Topic-driven networking pipeline as a Claude skill.

item.title: Phrase Chain Spanish edition
item.description: Fork of phrase-chain retrained on Spanish corpora.

item.title: Notebook
item.description: A web-based notebook for jotting and threading ideas.
